---
title: "A Deep Learning Approach to Antibiotic Discovery"
description: "Halcin: the first antibiotic discovered using a deep neural network screen."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-02-23"
categories: [biomedical, deep learning, science, paper, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![A Deep Learning Approach to Antibiotic Discovery. Image from [MIT News](https://news.mit.edu/2020/artificial-intelligence-identifies-new-antibiotic-0220).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Halcin: the first antibiotic discovered with AI/DNN.

"First, we trained a deep neural network model to predict growth inhibition of Escherichia coli using a collection of 2,335 molecules. Second, we applied the resulting model to several discrete chemical libraries, comprising >107 million molecules, to identify potential lead compounds with activity against E. coli. After ranking the compounds according to the model's predicted score, we lastly selected a list of candidates based on a pre-specified prediction score threshold, chemical structure, and availability."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_a-deep-learning-approach-to-antibiotic-discovery-activity-6637189337257771008-1VDX).*
